2026-0676
2026-06-25PMOInvest in Canada ActOrder Designating the President of the King’s Privy Council for Canada as the Minister Responsible for the Invest in Canada ActOrder (1) repealing P.C. 2018-49 of January 31, 2018; (2) designating the President of the King’s Privy Council for Canada, a member of the King’s Privy Council for Canada, as the Minister for the purposes of the Invest in Canada Act.N/A
subject: Order Designating the President of the King’s Privy Council for Canada as the Minister Responsible for the Invest in Canada Act
precis: Order (1) repealing P.C. 2018-49 of January 31, 2018; (2) designating the President of the King’s Privy Council for Canada, a member of the King’s Privy Council for Canada, as the Minister for the purposes of the Invest in Canada Act.
